title: Opening for Production Engineer at Prince Pipes

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Prince Pipes
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!
